tldr: Limited public coverage of Flèche Wallonne 2026 has surfaced at the depth this subsystem normally targets. The race is bracketed by Amstel Gold (won by Evenepoel) and Liège-Bastogne-Liège (won by Pogačar), with the Ardennes mid-week classic falling on the Wednesday between them. This page will be expanded when source coverage stabilises.

narrative.headline: Race covered — full analysis pending source coverage

aftermath.headline: Pending full analysis
aftermath.body: La Flèche Wallonne is the Ardennes mid-week race between Amstel and Liège. The 2026 edition fell on Wednesday April 22. Public sources at the depth this subsystem requires are still thin at time of compilation; this page is intentionally minimal pending substantive coverage. The race is included in the manifest so the page exists; the analysis will be backfilled.
